jd_text: We are partnering with a well-established, mission-driven institution in the region that is focused on advancing research, innovation, and societal impact across women-focused sectors . The Director of Research & Innovation will play a critical leadership role in shaping and executing the organization’s research agenda , driving innovation-led initiatives, and supporting long-term institutional growth. This individual will work closely with senior leadership and governance bodies to position the organization as a regional and global thought leader , particularly across areas impacting women, inclusion, and community development. Key Responsibilities: Strategic Leadership & Innovation Define and lead the research and innovation strategy , aligned with the organization’s long-term vision Drive innovation frameworks, programs, and partnerships to enhance impact across women-focused fields Identify emerging trends, opportunities, and research priorities to position the organization at the forefront of its sector Institutional Growth & Transformation Lead initiatives that support organizational transformation and capability building Develop scalable programs that contribute to institutional growth and measurable societal impact Champion a culture of innovation, collaboration, and continuous improvement Governance & Board Engagement Work closely with senior leadership and board members to ensure strong governance, compliance, and strategic alignment Provide regular reporting, insights, and recommendations at board level Ensure all research and innovation activities adhere to best practice governance and regulatory standards Stakeholder Engagement & Partnerships Build and manage relationships with key stakeholders across academia, government, private sector, and non-profits Represent the organization at regional and international forums, conferences, and partnerships Foster collaborations that enhance research output, funding opportunities, and global positioning Communications & Thought Leadership Lead the development of high-impact communication strategies to promote research and innovation initiatives Position the organization as a thought leader through publications, events, and public engagement Support executive leadership with strategic messaging and external visibility Candidate Profile: 5–10+ years of experience , with a track record in research, innovation, or strategy-driven roles Currently in a leadership position , with experience managing teams and driving cross-functional initiatives Demonstrated success in strategic leadership, institutional growth, and organizational transformation Strong experience in governance, compliance, and board-level engagement Advanced academic qualifications (Master’s or PhD preferred) in a relevant field Excellent communication and presentation skills , with the ability to influence senior stakeholders Proven ability in stakeholder management across diverse and complex environments An innovation-driven mindset , with the ability to translate ideas into tangible outcomes Preferred Background Experience in women-focused sectors , social impact, education, research institutions, or policy environments Exposure to or involvement in sports-related initiatives , particularly in women’s sports, performance, or development programs Salary: 35-45 QAR plus benefits NOTE: OPEN TO OVERSEAS CANDIDATES WHO ARE WILLING TO RELOCATE TO QATAR DUE TO THE NUMBER OF APPLICATIONS RECEIVED, ONLY SHORTLISTED CANDIDATES WILL BE CONTACTED
